description: Recap Studio deterministic safety + DX hooks. Every hook is read-only or refuses risky writes.

PreToolUse.description: Refuse writes to .env*, secrets/**, private/**, **/id_rsa, **/*.pem unless RECAP_ALLOW_SECRET_WRITE=1.
Refuse destructive git: push, reset --hard, rebase, clean -fdx, branch -D, commit --amend --force, filter-branch.
Block production deploys unless recap-studio.config.ts deploymentMode is production-with-confirmation AND user confirmed.

PostToolUse.description: Format the just-written file with Prettier when available. Best-effort, never fails the run.

Stop.description: Emit a compact run summary: files touched, last validation scores, blockers.
